goal: Recover or rediscover one live input-correlated Rift feature quickly using the focused-PostMessage workflow and stop after the first validated winner.

current_authority.workflow_authority: focused_postmessage_live_feature_discovery via this packet; C:\RIFT MODDING\RiftReader\docs\recovery\rebuild-runbook.md is the canonical escalation order.

lineage.primary: fresh selected-source transform family for orientation work
lineage.secondary: older owner/projector/hub family is stale secondary evidence only

current_authority.input_mode: focused PostMessage with Rift foreground verified or re-established before each live input send
current_authority.current_trusted_lane: focused PostMessage; do not silently downgrade to SendInput

meta.desktop_topology: Rift may run on another isolated or non-visible desktop while Codex remains elsewhere.
meta.front_path_policy: Treat this packet as the front-path execution packet. Load optional appendix material only if blocked, comparing workflows, or updating the packet.

must_read_now.role: living truth for what is valid right now
current live-input safety and trust model

non_negotiables: Do not use stale lineage as current truth.
Do not merge the fresh transform lineage and the older owner/projector/hub lineage mentally.
Do not silently change input mode or fall back to SendInput when focused PostMessage is required.
Do not treat hidden-desktop screenshot heuristics as authoritative when that desktop is not visible.
Do not generalize offsets, workflow claims, or compatibility beyond the environment actually validated.
Stop on listed blockers instead of broadening the workflow by guesswork.
proactive_defaults: Proceed without asking unless a listed blocker occurs.
Stop after the first validated winner.
Do not broaden scope unless `Stop if` is triggered.
Retry without forced ReaderBridge refresh if refresh is the only failing layer.

current_assignment.active: Verify the reader baselines, then run the focused-PostMessage wrapper to screen a bounded candidate set and pin the first validated winner.
current_assignment.next: If no validated winner exists, run post-update triage and sample the suggested watch regions instead of widening the workflow.
validation: ReaderBridge snapshot loads and current player snapshot exists.
Player current read matches ReaderBridge identity and current values closely enough for live work.
Coord anchor still resolves and remains usable for drift checks.
Any rotational winner shows opposite-direction paired responses with bounded idle drift and bounded coordinate drift.
Exact command, artifact paths, candidate source, basis offset, thresholds, delivery mode, and winner or blocker classification are recorded.
stop_if: Rift window is missing, crashed, or focus verification fails.
done_when: One current-process source proves under the controlled focused-PostMessage stimulus and survives current-client validation.
A blocker is recorded with machine-readable evidence and an exact next step.

preferred_execution_order.goal: Confirm the reader baseline still supports live before-and-after comparisons.
Use the trusted focused-PostMessage lane to screen a bounded candidate set with separate aggressive artifacts.

rules: Prefer the first candidate that survives the feature gate with bounded drift.
Pin the candidate immediately once it is credible.
Stop immediately once the full recovery pass proves the feature.

preferred_execution_order.goal: Narrow the next search space only after aggressive screening fails.

rules: Update current truth when the winner is validated.
Update this packet only if the live method changed materially.

return: blocker classification or warning if any
exact next command or next action

winner_expectations: opposite-direction paired responses for rotational features
stable source identity across the relevant captures

notes: The current client still validates actor yaw on basis family 0xD4, but unpinned live candidate selection can drift.
The decisive tactic was to treat an A-stimulus source-drift response as a pin candidate, then prove the pinned source with opposite-direction A/D recovery.

historical_priors.role: dated proof that the workflow succeeded on actor yaw and why it succeeded
load_only_when: blocked and needing a validated historical example

historical_priors.role: pre-win actor-yaw restart strategy kept only for comparisons
load_only_when: comparing the pre-win and post-win actor-yaw approaches
